rows.label: qev051506_MSG0001
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]-san, I never thought I would
run into you again in a place like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051506_MSG0002
rows.name:
Ever since that incident,
in order to protect the Biahno Water Purification Plant,
my Ma-non friend here—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051506_MSG0003
rows.name:
Veven, helped me to create
a much higher-performance guard machine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051506_MSG0004
rows.name:
Heheh, I decided to enter the tournament as a test run,
but I never expected to draw you as my opponent![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051506_MSG0005
rows.name:
This is gonna be fun!
The super technology I learned from Doc
and this insect-bro's skills...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051506_MSG0006
rows.name:
They're both combined in this ultimate guard machine!
I absolutely won't lose![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051506_MSG0007
rows.name:
I apologize, but having taken the liberty of
analyzing your combat data,
our win rate exceeds 98%.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051506_MSG0008
rows.name:
I believe this will be a rather one-sided experiment,
but please provide us with more of your valuable data, won't you?[ST:wait ]
